AboutPage.title: About
AboutPage.description: Journal Prompts helps you find the perfect writing prompt based on your mood and goals.
AboutPage.introduction: We believe everyone deserves a moment of self-reflection. Journal Prompts uses smart matching to connect you with the right journal prompt at the right time — no scrolling, no overwhelm, just the perfect starting point for your writing practice.

features.title: Features
features.subtitle: Why Journal Prompts?
features.description: Everything you need for a meaningful journaling practice

item-1.title: Smart Mood Matching
item-1.description: Tell us how you're feeling, and we match you with the most relevant journal prompts from our curated library of 1,000+ prompts.

item-2.title: Write Right Here
item-2.description: No need to switch apps. Start writing immediately in our built-in journaling space with auto-save.

item-3.title: 14 Curated Topics
item-3.description: From gratitude and self-discovery to shadow work and mental health — find prompts organized by life's most important themes.

item-4.title: Backed by Psychology
item-4.description: Every prompt is grounded in research from positive psychology, CBT, and mindfulness practices.

pricing.title: Pricing

pricing.description: Choose the plan that works best for you

item-1.question: What are journal prompts?
item-1.answer: Journal prompts are thought-provoking questions or statements designed to inspire reflective writing. They help you explore your thoughts, feelings, and experiences in a structured way.

item-2.question: How does the prompt matching work?
item-2.answer: Our system uses a curated library of 1,000+ prompts tagged by mood and topic. When you select your current mood and desired direction, we match you with the 3 most relevant prompts.

item-3.question: Is my writing saved?
item-3.answer: Your writing is saved locally in your browser using localStorage. It stays on your device and is never sent to any server. Clear your browser data to remove it.

item-4.question: Are these prompts free to use?
item-4.answer: Yes! All prompts and the writing space are completely free. No account required, no hidden fees.

item-5.question: Can I use these prompts for therapy?
item-5.answer: While our prompts are grounded in psychology research, they are not a substitute for professional therapy. They can complement therapeutic practices when used alongside professional guidance.

item-1.name: Sarah M.
item-1.quote: I used to stare at a blank page for 20 minutes. Now I get a prompt that actually matches my mood and I start writing instantly.

item-2.name: David K.
item-2.quote: I recommend Journal Prompts to my clients as a complement to our sessions. The psychology-backed prompts are genuinely helpful.

item-3.name: Emily R.
item-3.quote: The mood matching feature is brilliant. My students love having prompts tailored to how they're actually feeling in the moment.

item-4.name: Michael T.
item-4.quote: I've tried dozens of journal prompt sites. This is the first one that doesn't make me scroll through hundreds of irrelevant prompts.

item-5.name: Lisa W.
item-5.quote: The shadow work and self-discovery prompts have helped me uncover patterns I never noticed before. Truly transformative.

item-6.name: James P.
item-6.quote: I love that I can write directly on the site. No switching between apps, no friction — just me and my thoughts.

item-7.name: Anna C.
item-7.quote: As someone who struggles with anxiety, having a prompt that meets me where I am emotionally makes all the difference.

item-8.name: Robert H.
item-8.quote: I use these prompts with my clients to spark deeper conversations. The topic categories are well thought out.

item-9.name: Jessica L.
item-9.quote: I had no idea where to start with journaling. This tool made it so easy — just pick my mood and start writing.

item-10.name: Chris B.
item-10.quote: I appreciate that the prompts are grounded in actual psychology research. It's not just random questions.

item-11.name: Maria G.
item-11.quote: Finally a journaling tool that respects privacy. Everything stays in my browser — no account needed, no data collected.

item-12.name: Tom S.
item-12.quote: This has become part of my morning routine. Three seconds to find a prompt, ten minutes of meaningful writing. Perfect.
